item.title: Intake-to-Invoice Automation for a Field Services Company
item.description: The office manager’s own words: the automation replaced a process that ate half a day every week, and it paid for itself in the first month. The system still keeps a human in the loop for anything unusual — it automates the repetitive parts, not the judgment calls.
